version_note: Extended version: 11 AI/ML concept definitions. Original ProDaBi WS1 uses a food-card paragraph format. This version adds AI concepts (TP, FP, sensitivity, MCR, overfitting, decision tree) beyond the original ProDaBi scope.
answer_key_source: Worksheet 1.pdf plus extended AI terms for AI-CFT alignment.
aicft_scope_note: WS1 only asks for definitions and formulas. It maps to LO3.1.1 (conceptual knowledge) and, for the decision tree item, LO3.1.2 (what AI is). It does not ask the student to apply or visualize anything, so it produces no direct Deepen (LO3.2.x) evidence. Overfitting (B10) can carry a weak Deepen signal only, never a confirmation.

WS1_B1.label: Nesne (Object)
WS1_B1.full: Captures that a nesne is an individual entity or instance in the dataset. At least 2 tokens from required_any.
WS1_B1.partial: Only one token from required_any, or gives a contextual example alone (e.g. 'gıda') without a general definition.
WS1_B1.zero: Empty, tautological ('nesne bir şeydir'), or defines a different concept.
WS1_B1.canonical_answer: Üzerinde çalışılan varlık ya da örnek.

WS1_B2.label: Özellik / Karakteristik / Değişken (Feature)
WS1_B2.full: Captures that özellik is a measurable attribute of the object. Must include ölçülebilir or nitelik or an equivalent.
WS1_B2.partial: Names an example feature (e.g. 'şeker miktarı') without a general definition.
WS1_B2.zero: Empty or defines nesne or etiket instead.

WS1_B3.label: Etiket (Label)
WS1_B3.full: Captures that etiket is the class or category a nesne belongs to. Must reference sınıf, kategori, or the outcome variable.
WS1_B3.partial: Gives only the example values ('tavsiye edilir/edilmez') without explaining what etiket is in general.

WS1_B4.label: Eşik Değeri (Threshold)
WS1_B4.full: Captures that eşik değeri is a numeric boundary that splits a feature into two groups. Must include sınır, ayıran, or iki grup.
WS1_B4.partial: Gives only a numeric example without explaining the boundary function.
WS1_B4.zero: Empty or confuses with özellik or değişken.
WS1_B4.canonical_answer: Bir özelliği iki gruba ayıran sınır sayısı.

WS1_B5.label: Kural (Rule)
WS1_B5.full: Captures the if-then structure. Must mention eğer-o zaman, if-then, or a conditional structure.
WS1_B5.partial: Describes a rule informally without the conditional structure.
WS1_B5.zero: Empty or describes a formula instead of a rule.
common_confusions: describes a formula instead of a conditional
WS1_B5.canonical_answer: Eğer-o zaman biçiminde ifade edilen karar cümlesi.

WS1_B6.label: Doğru Pozitif (True Positive, TP)
WS1_B6.full: Conveys both sides: model predicted positive AND actual is positive.
WS1_B6.partial: Mentions only one side, or uses 'doğru sınıflandırdığı pozitif' where the two-sided contrast is implicit but not explicit.
WS1_B6.canonical_answer: Modelin pozitif olarak tahmin ettiği ve gerçekte de pozitif olan örnekler.
WS1_B6.scoring_note: Two-sided requirement is a deliberate strictness choice. A single-sided answer caps at partial.

WS1_B7.label: Yanlış Pozitif (False Positive, FP)
WS1_B7.full: Conveys both sides: model predicted positive BUT actual is negative.
WS1_B7.partial: Mentions only the prediction ('model pozitif dedi') without contrasting with the actual label.
WS1_B7.zero: Empty or confuses FP with TP.
WS1_B7.canonical_answer: Modelin pozitif tahmin ettiği ama gerçekte negatif olan örnekler.

WS1_B8.label: Duyarlılık / Sensitivity
WS1_B8.full: Normalized formula equals TP/(TP+FN), or an equivalent verbal definition (true positive rate).
WS1_B8.partial: Mentions TP and FN but assembles the formula incorrectly (e.g. TP/FP, TP/total).
WS1_B8.zero: Empty, wrong formula, or confuses with MCR.

WS1_B9.label: MCR (Misclassification Rate)
WS1_B9.partial: Mentions FP, FN, and total but assembles the formula incorrectly.
WS1_B9.zero: Empty, wrong formula, or uses only FP or only FN.

WS1_B10.label: Aşırı Öğrenme (Overfitting)
WS1_B10.full: Captures the two-sided nature: performs well on training data but poorly on new or test data.
WS1_B10.partial: Mentions only one side (fits training data well, OR cannot generalize, not both).
WS1_B10.zero: Empty or confuses overfitting with underfitting.
WS1_B10.canonical_answer: Modelin eğitim verisine aşırı uyum sağlaması sonucu yeni verilere genelleyememesi.

deepen_signal.rule: Only a full two-sided answer counts as a weak Deepen signal. A partial answer stays at Acquire.

WS1_B11.label: Karar Ağacı (Decision Tree)
WS1_B11.full: Captures both: (1) learns from data, and (2) tree structure (dal/yaprak/düğüm) or rule-based nature.
WS1_B11.partial: Mentions only one of: data learning OR tree structure.
WS1_B11.zero: Empty or gives only a visual description without mentioning learning from data.
common_confusions: only describes the drawing, not the learning
WS1_B11.canonical_answer: Veriden kural öğrenen, dal ve yaprak düğümlerden oluşan sınıflandırma modeli.

credit_bands.zero: score_ratio < 0.45 or fewer than 5 items attempted

worksheet_rollup.note: This is a worksheet-level credit band only. It is not an AI-CFT level. Level assignment happens at the portfolio level.
